{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}
<% if (it.hasModifiers) { %>
== Modifiers ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|modifiers}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasUsedBy) { %>
== Used By ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|used_by}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
